200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, gives 3 allies with the lowest health shields blocking 20% damage for 4 sec. Eclipse restores one’s own health by 20% of the damage blocked by shields.

description 4/6

Once in a while, gives 3 allies with the lowest health shields blocking 30% damage for 5 sec. Eclipse restores one’s own health by 20% of the damage blocked by shields. Once in a while, the Eclipse attack causes an explosion dealing the enemies 30000 damage for 5 sec. Eclipse restores 8000 health for each enemy affected by the explosion for 5 sec. It also restores 8000 health for 5 sec to the allies equal to the number of enemies affected by the explosion. Additionally, the fighter’s physical armor value increases by 20% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, gives 3 allies with the lowest health shields blocking 40 % damage for 5 sec. Eclipse restores one’s ow health by 20% of the damage blocked by shields. Once in a while, the Eclipse attack causes an explosion stunning all the enemies for 1 sec and dealing them 40000 damage for 5 sec. Eclipse restores 10000 health for each enemy affected by the explosion for 5 sec. It also restores 10000 health for 5 sec to the number of enemies affected by the explosion. Additionally, the fighter’s physical armor value increases by 30% for 5 sec. After the explosion, all allied fighters receive shields that block 60% damage. Lasts for 5 sec. Eclipse restores one’s own health by 20% of the damage blocked by shields.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When Eclipse restores health from a shield gained from set abilities (except for shields cast after the explosion), all enemies in a small radius around Eclipse take damage equal to 120% of the restored health.

description 4/6

When Eclipse restores health from a shield gained from set abilities (except for shields cast after the explosion), all enemies in a small radius around Eclipse take damage equal to 120% of the restored health. All enemies hit by the explosion take additional physical damage equal to 300% of their physical armor.

description 6/6

When Eclipse restores health from a shield gained from set abilities (except for shields cast after the explosion), all enemies in a small radius around Eclipse take damage equal to 120% of the restored health. All enemies hit by the explosion take additional physical damage equal to 300% of their physical armor. When Eclipse restores health from a shield gained by allies after the explosion, all enemies in a small radius around Eclipse take physical damage equal to 125% of the restored health.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

For each ally that gets a shield from the Eclipse’s set abilities (except for shields cast after the explosion), Eclipse gets a shield that absorbs 30000 damage on any type for 6 sec.

description 4/6

For each ally that gets a shield from the Eclipse’s set abilities (except for shields cast after the explosion), Eclipse gets a shield that absorbs 40000 damage on any type for 6 sec. All allies who got healed after the explosion get a shield that absorbs 150000 damage of any type. Lasts for 10 sec.

description 6/6

For each ally that gets a shield from the Eclipse’s set abilities (except for shields cast after the explosion), Eclipse gets a shield that absorbs 50000 damage on any type for 6 sec. All allies who got healed after the explosion get a shield that absorbs 150000 damage of any type. Lasts for 10 sec. After the explosion, all negative effects are removed from Eclipse and the unit restores 15% of their max health.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Each ally that gets a shield from the Eclipse’s set abilities (except for shields cast after the explosion) has their max health increased by 10% of the Eclipse’s max health for 5 sec.

description 4/6

Each ally that gets a shield from the Eclipse’s set abilities (except for shields cast after the explosion) has their max health increased by 10% of the Eclipse’s max health for 5 sec. After the explosion, Eclipse’s magic armor also increases by 20% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Each ally that gets a shield from the Eclipse’s set abilities (except for shields cast after the explosion) has their max health increased by 10% of the Eclipse’s max health for 5 sec. After the explosion, Eclipse’s magic armor also increases by 30% for 5 sec. After the explosion, all healing received by Eclipse is increased by 75% for 5 sec. Also, the physical and magic armor of the unit are increased by 12% for each enemy hit by the explosion. Up to 1 effects.

Materials

Dawn Feather
Energy Accumulator
